channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Live Updates: "We Have To Address Connectivity Chokepoint Issues," Says S Jaishankar At Quad Meet

media:content.media:description: India is hosting the Quad meeting in its capacity as the current chair of the coalition (File photo)

item.description: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

item.title: Quad Grouping Seeks Relevance As Foreign Ministers Meet In New Delhi

media:content.media:description: The four nations had expected to hold a summit in India last year

item.description: The Quad meeting comes as the US and Iran have circled around a possible deal to end their three-month conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The Quad meeting comes as the US and Iran have circled around a possible deal to end their three-month conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 5 Kg Heroin Found In Punjabi Singer's Thar, Drug Racket Linked To Australia

media:content.media:description: Harbir Singh Sohal was arrested with 5 kg of heroin and Rs 1.50 lakh in cash

item.description: Harbir Singh Sohal was allegedly a "courier" in a drug supply network that was being operated from Australia, the police said.
item.content:encoded: Harbir Singh Sohal was allegedly a "courier" in a drug supply network that was being operated from Australia, the police said.

item.title: What Are Abraham Accords That Trump Wants Pak, Saudi To Join For Iran Peace

media:content.media:description: The biggest prize in the accords for Israel was the agreement with the UAE

item.description: Most Arab states had long maintained that they could not establish ties with Tel Aviv until a separate Palestinian state was created.
item.content:encoded: Most Arab states had long maintained that they could not establish ties with Tel Aviv until a separate Palestinian state was created.

item.title: Quad Foreign Ministers Meet In Delhi To Revive Group After Trump Tension

media:content.media:description: The meeting takes place as the US and Iran are inching close to a deal to extend ceasefire

item.description: The Quad, formed to counter China's growing influence in the Asia-Pacific region, has been beset by tension after Trump last year raised tariffs on Indian goods.
item.content:encoded: The Quad, formed to counter China's growing influence in the Asia-Pacific region, has been beset by tension after Trump last year raised tariffs on Indian goods.

item.title: "Good Deal Or No Deal": Top US Diplomat On Pact With Iran After US Strikes

media:content.media:description: Rubio told reporters that "the straits have to be open".

item.description: The strikes came as top Iranian negotiators arrived in Doha for the latest round of talks to end the months-long conflict, which had prompted Iran to blockade the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial artery for global energy exports.
item.content:encoded: The strikes came as top Iranian negotiators arrived in Doha for the latest round of talks to end the months-long conflict, which had prompted Iran to blockade the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial artery for global energy exports.

item.title: The Curious Case Of An Award-Winning Story That Is Likely AI-Written

media:content.media:description: The irony that AI is used to detect AI-writing is not lost on anyone

item.description: A short story that won one of the English-speaking world's most recognised literary prizes is now at the centre of an uncomfortable AI debate.
item.content:encoded: A short story that won one of the English-speaking world's most recognised literary prizes is now at the centre of an uncomfortable AI debate.

item.title: Woman Sent To Portugal's Toughest Prison After Children Abandoned In Woods

media:content.media:description: The sexologist will be unable to leave her cell and cannot contact other inmates.

item.description: A French mother and her partner have been imprisoned in Portugal after allegedly abandoning two young children in the woods as part of a cruel game, leaving them terrified and alone.
item.content:encoded: A French mother and her partner have been imprisoned in Portugal after allegedly abandoning two young children in the woods as part of a cruel game, leaving them terrified and alone.

item.title: "There's No Hiding": Valuation Guru Aswath Damodaran Says Markets Ignoring Terrifying China Risk

media:content.media:description: Aswath Damodaran

item.description: Asked whether that means the next crash could be worse than 2001, Damodaran said the fallout would likely be broader, deeper and harder to escape.
item.content:encoded: Asked whether that means the next crash could be worse than 2001, Damodaran said the fallout would likely be broader, deeper and harder to escape.

item.title: Dog Accidentally Fires Shotgun In US, Injures Woman Standing Nearby

media:content.media:description: The dog somehow triggered multiple shots.

item.description: Nebraska law prohibits travelling with a loaded shotgun in a vehicle on any highway.
item.content:encoded: Nebraska law prohibits travelling with a loaded shotgun in a vehicle on any highway.

item.title: Canada "Working Fast" For "Game Changer" Trade Deal With India

media:content.media:description: The remarks by the Canadian Prime Minister came after he met Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal

item.description: Canada and India have been in trade talks since 2010. Talks were shut down by Ottawa in 2023 after Canadian authorities alleged that India was involved in the killing of Canadian Sikh activist Hardeep Singh Nijjar near Vancouver in June that year.
item.content:encoded: Canada and India have been in trade talks since 2010. Talks were shut down by Ottawa in 2023 after Canadian authorities alleged that India was involved in the killing of Canadian Sikh activist Hardeep Singh Nijjar near Vancouver in June that year.

item.title: US Attacks Iran's Bandar Abbas, Then A 'Uranium' Warning From Trump

media:content.media:description: US Attacks Iran: US Said the strikes were taken in "self-defence"

item.description: Tehran is yet to respond to the latest US strikes, and it remains unclear if the new American agression will have any impact on a potential peace agreement between the two warring nations.
item.content:encoded: Tehran is yet to respond to the latest US strikes, and it remains unclear if the new American agression will have any impact on a potential peace agreement between the two warring nations.

item.title: US-Iran War LIVE: US Says Hormuz Strait Has To Open 'One Way Or Other' After Bandar Abbas Strikes

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: The US Central Command said the strikes were conducted in "self-defence."

item.description: Iran War: The US military on Monday carried out strikes on Iranian missile launch sites and boats laying mines.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: The US military on Monday carried out strikes on Iranian missile launch sites and boats laying mines.

item.title: Viral Video Shows US Students Graduating In Heavy Rain, Parents Slam School

media:content.media:description: Parents called the decision "out of order".

item.description: Parts of the events were cancelled, including a planned moment of silence for a classmate who died last year.
item.content:encoded: Parts of the events were cancelled, including a planned moment of silence for a classmate who died last year.

item.title: "Turn Over Nuclear Dust": Trump Warns Iran As US Conducts Fresh Strikes

media:content.media:description: Trump said Iran's enriched uranium should be immediately turned over to the US

item.description: Donald Trump's warning came as the US forces conducted "self-defence" strikes on Iranian boats and missile launch facilities.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's warning came as the US forces conducted "self-defence" strikes on Iranian boats and missile launch facilities.

item.title: US Conducts 'Self-Defence' Strikes On Iranian Boats, Missile Launch Sites

media:content.media:description: The US military carried out strikes on Monday in southern Iran.

item.description: US Central Command said in a statement the strikes were designed "to protect our troops from threats posed by Iranian forces."
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1104320/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US Central Command said in a statement the strikes were designed "to protect our troops from threats posed by Iranian forces."

item.title: 2nd Group Of Australian Women Linked To ISIS To Return Home

media:content.media:description: This month, 13 more IS-linked Australians -- four women and their nine children -- flew home from Syria.

item.description: Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke said the government was not assisting their travel and that any who have committed crimes "can expect to face the full force of the law".
item.content:encoded: Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke said the government was not assisting their travel and that any who have committed crimes "can expect to face the full force of the law".

item.title: 6.9 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Chile, No Injuries Reported

media:content.media:description: A magnitude 6.9 earthquake struck northern Chile on Monday, the US Geological Survey (USGS) reported.

item.description: A magnitude 6.9 earthquake struck northern Chile on Monday, the US Geological Survey (USGS) reported.
item.content:encoded: A magnitude 6.9 earthquake struck northern Chile on Monday, the US Geological Survey (USGS) reported.

item.title: Trump Says Iran's Enriched Uranium Will Be "Turned Over" To US Or Destroyed

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump also said that it can be destroyed at an acceptable location.

item.description: Trump said this decision will be taken in "conjunction and collaboration" with Iran, signalling Tehran's relaxing its stand as the two countries attempt to reach a peace agreement.
item.content:encoded: Trump said this decision will be taken in "conjunction and collaboration" with Iran, signalling Tehran's relaxing its stand as the two countries attempt to reach a peace agreement.

item.title: Quarantined Spaniard Tests Positive For Hantavirus

media:content.media:description: It is the second confirmed case of the hantavirus in Spain.

item.description: A Spaniard placed under quarantine after partaking in a cruise hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak has tested positive, the Spanish ministry of health said on Monday.
item.content:encoded: A Spaniard placed under quarantine after partaking in a cruise hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak has tested positive, the Spanish ministry of health said on Monday.
